_notes: No Desert Data Center Coalition has FB presence (linked via linktr.ee/nodesertdatacenter) but exact FB URL not indexable via web search. Also on Instagram @no_desert_data_center and Bluesky.
Save Bren Mar Coalition website confirmed. No dedicated Facebook group found via web search.
Clean Air Coalition of WNY - formal nonprofit. FB page confirmed per multiple refs (handle pattern matches Instagram/LinkedIn: cleanairwny). URL is best-guess construction.

Troup County Anti-Data Center Coalition by Gage Bailey. Confirmed FB page (news refs Democratic candidate posting on it). Also created 'Say No to Data Centers in LaGrange, Georgia' FB group. Exact URL not retrievable via web search.
Kenoshans Unite Against Microsoft Data Center - confirmed FB PAGE by Olivia Walker. Posts videos and infographics. Exact URL not retrievable via web search.
WRFRD Facebook GROUP confirmed ~3000 members. Founded by Jessica Sharp. Formerly 'Wilmington Data Center Discussion Forum'. Exact URL not retrievable via web search.
W.A.T.E.R. Facebook GROUP confirmed 248 members (as of Feb 2026). Started by Barry and Lorie Blankenship.
Carroll County Anti-Data Center Coalition by Zack Martin. Social media organizing referenced in news. Exact FB URL not retrievable.
Stop Archbald Data Centers - confirmed FB GROUP formed by Tamara Misewicz-Healey and Justin Healey, late Oct 2025.
Sugarloaf Alliance is formal nonprofit. Website confirmed.

NIMBY Imperial confirmed to have both Facebook and Instagram pages. ~50 volunteers. 4000+ petition signatures. Exact FB URL not retrievable. Valle Imperial Resiste is a separate grassroots group also opposing.
Stop the Data Center has hundreds of active members. On Action Network and Substack (stopthedatacenter.substack.com). FB group referenced but exact URL not retrievable.
Protect Wiscasset by Richard Davis. Website confirmed.
Responsible Energy Alliance (~500 members). Merger of Protect Fredonia Coalition (Andrew McComb, Patti Plough) and Saukville group. Filed motion to intervene with PSCW. Exact FB URL not retrievable.
Coalition Against Data Centers in South Ohio - confirmed FB GROUP, 600+ members. Admin: Jay Kidd (Hamilton, OH). Exact URL not retrievable.
NO DATA CENTER LMBT - confirmed FB page/group by Todd and Heather Rehrig. Change.org petition ~4600 signatures. Exact URL not retrievable.
Concerned Clifton Citizens FB PAGE launched by former supervisor June Ejk. Also NoDataCenter.net website.
DE-CLEAR (Delaware Data Center Coalition for Local, Environmental, and Accountable Regulation). Active in regulatory advocacy. No FB presence found.
Concerned Citizens of Montour County - confirmed FB GROUP, 2300 followers. Started Aug 2025 with 4 members. Petition signed by ~3000. Successfully blocked Talen Energy rezoning.
Adams County for Responsible Development - confirmed FB GROUP, 1300 members. Created by Nikki Gerber.
Protect Pickaway Alliance confirmed on Facebook. Created by Mayor Aaron Thomas and Admin Joe Allen of South Bloomfield. Coalition of local govts.
Save Our Springs Alliance - established nonprofit (since 1992). Has FB page. Worked with San Marcos River Foundation.
Sembrando Esperanza Coalition - coalition of 9 neighborhood orgs. Website confirmed. Led by Veronica Carbajal.
GES Coalition (Globeville Elyria Swansea). Formal nonprofit since 2015. Also on Instagram @gescoalition and Twitter @GES_Coalition.
Sierra Club NJ Chapter. FB PAGE confirmed. Large established org leading data center legislation efforts.
Same No Desert Data Center Coalition as Marana entry.
Concerned Citizens of Twiggs County - confirmed FB GROUP, 600+ members. Filed lawsuit (attorney: Rob Fricks). Also incorporated.
Renwick Area Against Data Centers. Website confirmed. Town halls at Colwich Elementary.
EDRA of MI (Economic Development Responsibility Alliance) is statewide nonprofit. Local FB groups: 'Citizens against Saline Data Center' and 'Protect Saline Township - No Data Center'.
Stop Solon Township Data Center. Website confirmed. 130+ at township hall. Got 6-month moratorium.
Dorr Township MI - We The People. Confirmed FB GROUP, ~500 members opposing Microsoft data center.
NO DATA CENTER in Lyon Township. Confirmed private FB GROUP created Dec 13, gained 1200+ members in 4 days. Opposing Verrus/Project Flex.
